title: koeleria gracilis subsp. seminuda
intro: Koeleria gracilis subsp. seminuda is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly known as smooth hair grass. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Koeleria gracilis subsp. seminuda is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw herb or used in traditional remedies.
